title: StudioDash Release Notes
description: Public StudioDash release notes, development milestones, and availability updates from BarkinMad Studios.
summary: StudioDash release notes track public-facing product milestones while the app remains in development.

sections.heading: Current status
paragraphs: StudioDash is currently in development. The public website now includes a documented StudioDash app section with product overview, feature, integration, analytics, reporting, sync, security, FAQ, and release-note pages.
Availability, beta access, App Store information, and release timing will be published when BarkinMad Studios is ready to announce them.

sections.heading: Initial public documentation
paragraphs: The initial StudioDash documentation introduces the product as a Mac and iPad dashboard for indie app and game developers.

The documentation covers the current provider set at a public level: App Store Connect, AdMob, AdSense, Cloudflare, Google Search Console, Google Ads placeholder coverage, and GitHub placeholder coverage.

sections.heading: Future updates
paragraphs: Future release notes should focus on public product changes, availability milestones, newly released integrations, and user-facing improvements.
Private project notes, unpublished implementation details, and account credentials must not be included in public release notes.
